content_of_post_to_comment: When people say, ‘It’s easy for you,’ my answer is, ‘Yes. But you wouldn’t be able to handle it.’ *You envy the outcome, but you couldn’t endure the process tsk tsk tsk
comment: The interesting part is that endurance itself can become a blind spot: people may underestimate the cost of a path, but those on the path can underestimate the privileges that made the burden survivable.
